lines.format: Grid coordinates (8-10 digit MGRS) or known landmark
lines.notes: Give the pickup site, not your current position if different.

lines.format: Freq in MHz, then call sign of requesting unit
lines.notes: Give primary freq first. Alternate freq if primary is compromised.

lines.format: A = Urgent (<2hr), B = Urgent Surgical (<2hr needs OR), C = Priority (<4hr), D = Routine (<24hr), E = Convenience
lines.notes: Urgent = life, limb, or eyesight at risk. Be accurate -- affects resource allocation.

lines.format: A = None, B = Hoist, C = Extraction equip, D = Ventilator
lines.notes: Hoist required if no suitable LZ. Ventilator if intubated.
Determines aircraft configuration and crew requirements.

lines.format: N = No enemy, P = Possible enemy, E = Enemy in area (armed escort needed), X = Enemy troops in area (armed escort essential)
lines.notes: Transmitted encrypted if possible. Affects whether armed escort required.

lines.format: A = Panels, B = Pyrotechnic signal, C = Smoke, D = None, E = Other
lines.notes: Do NOT transmit smoke color until after aircraft identifies color -- prevents enemy deception.

lines.format: A = US military, B = US civilian, C = Non-US military, D = Non-US civilian, E = EPW (Enemy Prisoner of War)
lines.notes: EPW requires armed escort and affects MEDEVAC crew protocols.

lines.format: N = Nuclear, B = Biological, C = Chemical, None if clean
lines.notes: If NBC: MEDEVAC crew needs appropriate PPE. Delays response -- declare only if genuine.

memory_aid: My Rocks Said Follow Nine Soldiers My Nation
